plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to eliminate high risk.
Increase allocation to income ETF QQQI for stability.
Trim broad index ETFs (SPY, QQQ) to reduce concentration and build cash.
Buy XOM and COP, strong energy names, for diversification.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a significant cash buffer.
Expect lower volatility and a modest target return.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of ~1.5% monthly return. It significantly reduces leverage and concentrates on income and stable assets, leading to lower expected drawdowns.

plan: Trim leveraged ETF SOXL and sell SPAL to reduce overall leverage.
Reduce concentration in SPY and QQQ to build a cash buffer.
Increase position in strong performer CRWD.
Add new positions in promising tech names AMD and META.
This approach balances growth with risk reduction.
Expect moderate growth with controlled drawdowns.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5% monthly return by reducing leverage and concentration while adding quality growth names. It aims for risk-first growth, accepting moderate drawdowns for higher potential gains.

plan: Increase position in leveraged SOXL, accepting higher risk for amplified gains.
Trim SPY and QQQ to free up capital for higher conviction plays.
Significantly increase allocation to strong performer CRWD.
Sell the weak SMH ETF.
Add high-potential tech names AMD and META.
This plan aggressively pursues growth with concentrated high-conviction bets and leverage.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly return by leaning into leverage and concentrated high-scoring setups. It accepts significantly higher potential drawdowns due to increased leverage and concentrated positions, requiring strict stop discipline.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta tech (CRWD, QQQ).
Maximize allocation to income-focused QQQI for steady distributions.
Add broad index SPY for potential yield and stability.
Buy energy stocks XOM and COP for their dividend income.
This plan prioritizes consistent monthly income and capital preservation.
Expect low drawdowns and reliable, though variable, income distributions.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1% monthly return by focusing on yield-generating assets and reducing volatility. It prioritizes stable monthly distributions over growth, with low expected drawdowns but variable income.
